title: [CI:DOCS] Fix remote docs
body:
Fix renaming bug in remote-docs.sh
Remove mentions of 'remote' in windows and mac dos
Remove podman-remote.conf.5

Closes https://github.com/containers/libpod/issues/6584



Signed-off-by: Ashley Cui <acui@redhat.com>

comments.body:
/approve
/lgtm
I am going to approve for now.  @ashley-cui lets open another PR to add information to the podman remote command to explain the containers.conf file.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *ashley-cui*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> I am going to approve for now. @ashley-cui lets open another PR to add information to the podman remote command to explain the containers.conf file.

@rhatdan Sounds good, though you may have to explain what ends up in containers.conf to me first. I looked through and haven't seen any docs on containers.conf?
